scripts.install:meeting-api: python3 -m pip install -r apps/meeting-api/backend/requirements.txt || python -m pip install -r apps/meeting-api/backend/requirements.txt || py -3 -m pip install -r apps/meeting-api/backend/requirements.txt
scripts.ci:meeting-web: bun run --cwd apps/meeting-web lint && bun run --cwd apps/meeting-web test && bun run --cwd apps/meeting-web build
scripts.ci:roadmap-web: bun run --cwd apps/roadmap-web lint && bun run --cwd apps/roadmap-web typecheck && bun run --cwd apps/roadmap-web build
